apps.name: Opinion Market
apps.description: A prediction market, but for opinions.
apps.longDescription: Opinion Market lets anyone open a market on a subjective question and watch sentiment move in real time. Stake on the opinion you believe will win, see the odds shift as others weigh in, and settle out when the market resolves. Every position is an on-chain transaction, so the whole order book is transparent and verifiable.
apps.author: Usernode Labs

apps.name: Falling Sands
apps.longDescription: Falling Sands is a real-time, multiplayer falling-sand sandbox. Drop sand, water, oil, and fire into a shared grid and watch the physics play out alongside everyone else connected to the same world. Each meaningful interaction is committed on-chain, so the simulation history is shared and tamper-evident.
apps.author: Usernode Labs
screenshots: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='320' height='200' rx='12' fill='#111827'/><rect x='40' y='40' width='8' height='8' fill='#f59e0b'/><rect x='48' y='48' width='8' height='8' fill='#f59e0b'/><rect x='56' y='56' width='8' height='8' fill='#fbbf24'/><rect x='40' y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#3b82f6'/><rect x='120' y='80' width='8' height='8' fill='#ef4444'/><rect x='128' y='88' width='8' height='8' fill='#f97316'/></svg>

apps.name: Last One Wins
apps.description: Game where last one to add to the pot, gets the pot.
apps.longDescription: Last One Wins is a high-tension pot game: each contribution resets a countdown, and whoever holds the last position when the timer expires takes the entire pot. Watch the clock, read the room, and decide whether to extend your lead or wait for someone else to blink. All contributions and payouts are settled on-chain.
apps.author: Usernode Labs

apps.name: Echo Diagnostic
apps.description: Simple test of sending / receiving transactions
apps.author: Usernode Labs
